UK parliament petition

Accusation of Treason against HKSAR Chief Executive, British Citizen, Carrie Lam

Lam, as a British, is defying Her Majesty's Government's policy and threatening the safety of British in HK by forcefully enact the highly controversial HK Extradition Law Amendment, aiding the Chinese Government to destroy the HK judicial system and commitment from the Sino British Joint Decoration.

This is a highly controversial bill with over 1 million HK people protesting against it. The bill would allow the Chinese Government to extradite any personnel in HK regardless of their nationality back to China for trial. The original Sino British Joint Decoration and Extradition Policies set by Her Majesty's Government intentionally exclude China due to their poor judicial reputation. Lam, as a British, explicitly opposing the British commitment and values, should hence be charged as treason.
